title: Facilities Engineer
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

EPS CONSULTANTS PTE LTD

We are a leading recruitment agency with over a decade of experience in this industry, our clients trust in getting the job done, the right way. We are a trusted HR partner for local and global companies. Our comprehensive staffing solutions include candidate contingency and executive search, contract staffing, manpower outsourcing and recruitment process outsourcing (RPO).

Job Summary

Resolve engineering issues and perform maintenance to minimize equipment downtime while supporting facility operations and safety activities.

Responsibilities

  • Troubleshoot and isolate root causes of equipment issues to restore functionality and minimize downtime
  • Escalate unresolved incidents to supervisors promptly for further action
  • Perform planned preventive maintenance (PPM), reactive maintenance (RM), and service orders (SO) to maintain equipment reliability
  • Document standard operating procedures and equipment checklists to ensure consistent task execution
  • Collaborate with team members to monitor facility conditions and report operational impacts
  • Repair, maintain, and install building equipment and systems to ensure operational readiness
  • Conduct routine monitoring and spot checks on all building equipment and systems to identify potential issues
  • Participate actively in the company’s Emergency Response Team (ERT), first aid, and environmental health & safety (EHS) activities to support workplace safety
  • Respond to calls and emails promptly and professionally to maintain effective communication
  • Ensure proper handover and takeover during shift changes to maintain continuity of operations


Requirements:

  • Experience and with understanding mechanical and electrical field / engineering & building services industry will be a plus
  • Able to read architectural, structural, mechanical and electrical as built will be a plus
  • Able to commit to 12hrs rotating shift work that includes day, night and weekends


Interested candidates may apply directly with latest CVs to Patrina@eps.com.sg for immediate processing.
